[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 110110100 5
1 101010010 4
2 000110011 4
3 001010111 5
4 001101011 5
5 001000100 2
6 110000100 3
7 101010111 6
